GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING ROADMAP

GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students need practical, industry-relevant skills that connect classroom knowledge to internships, projects, professional practice, and global career opportunities.

COUNSELLING SKILLS

COUNSELLING SKILLS is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

CAREER GUIDANCE

CAREER GUIDANCE is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

PSYCHOSOCIAL SUPPORT

PSYCHOSOCIAL SUPPORT is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

ASSESSMENT TOOLS

ASSESSMENT TOOLS is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

CHILD PROTECTION

CHILD PROTECTION is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

GROUP COUNSELLING

GROUP COUNSELLING is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

RECORD KEEPING

RECORD KEEPING is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

REFERRAL SYSTEMS

REFERRAL SYSTEMS is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

COMMUNICATION SKILLS

COMMUNICATION SKILLS is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

ETHICS

ETHICS is a practical skill that helps GUIDANCE AND COUNSELLING students prepare for real professional work.

WHY THESE SKILLS MATTER

PROFESSIONAL READINESS

These skills help students move from theory to practical work.

EMPLOYER DEMAND

Employers value graduates who can use tools, solve problems, and communicate results.

CAREER GROWTH

Building these skills early creates stronger opportunities for internships, projects, and jobs.
